mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT lr.id AS leave_request_id, su.real_name AS student_name, ci.class_name, co.course_name, lr.leave_type, lr.reason, DATE_FORMAT(lr.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(lr.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS end_time, DATE_FORMAT(la.acted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS approved_at FROM leave_request lr JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = lr.student_id JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = lr.student_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id JOIN course_schedule cs ON cs.class_id = ci.id JOIN course_info co ON co.id = cs.course_id AND co.teacher_id = #{teacherId} JOIN leave_approval la ON la.leave_request_id = lr.id AND la.action = 'APPROVED' WHERE lr.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY approved_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ci.id AS classId, ci.class_name AS className, ci.class_code AS classCode, counselor.real_name AS counselorName, COUNT(DISTINCT sp.user_id) AS studentCount FROM course_info co JOIN course_schedule cs ON cs.course_id = co.id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = cs.class_id LEFT JOIN sys_user counselor ON counselor.id = ci.head_teacher_id LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.class_id = ci.id WHERE co.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND co.status = 1 GROUP BY ci.id, ci.class_name, ci.class_code, counselor.real_name ORDER BY ci.id

SELECT su.id AS userId, su.real_name AS studentName, sp.student_no AS studentNo, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 END) AS presentCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 END) AS absentCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'LATE' THEN 1 END) AS lateCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'LEAVE' THEN 1 END) AS leaveCount, COUNT(ar.id) AS totalCount FROM student_profile sp JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN attendance_record ar ON ar.student_id = su.id AND ar.class_id = #{classId} AND ar.course_id IN ( SELECT co.id FROM course_info co WHERE co.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ) WHERE sp.class_id = #{classId} GROUP BY su.id, su.real_name, sp.student_no ORDER BY sp.student_no

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT co2.id) FROM course_info co2 WHERE co2.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND co2.status = 1) AS courseCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs2.class_id) FROM course_schedule cs2 JOIN course_info co3 ON co3.id = cs2.course_id AND co3.teacher_id = #{teacherId}) AS classCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lr2.id) FROM leave_request lr2 JOIN student_profile sp2 ON sp2.user_id = lr2.student_id JOIN course_schedule cs3 ON cs3.class_id = sp2.class_id JOIN course_info co4 ON co4.id = cs3.course_id AND co4.teacher_id = #{teacherId} WHERE lr2.status = 'APPROVED' AND lr2.start_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AS recentApprovedLeaves, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lr3.id) FROM leave_request lr3 JOIN student_profile sp3 ON sp3.user_id = lr3.student_id JOIN course_schedule cs4 ON cs4.class_id = sp3.class_id JOIN course_info co5 ON co5.id = cs4.course_id AND co5.teacher_id = #{teacherId} WHERE lr3.status = 'APPROVED' AND DATE(lr3.start_time) <= CURDATE() AND DATE(lr3.end_time) >= CURDATE()) AS todayLeaveCount
